subcodes.first_line: In this day it behoveth all, according to their means, to discharge the rights of God during these few numbered years [3.5s]... ...In this day it is incumbent upon everyone to meet the obligation of the Right of God as far as it lieth in his power. For a number of years it was not permitted to accept the payment of Huquq
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم بر کل لازم است بقدر مقدور حقوق الهی را ادا نمایند در سنین معدودات
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity
